task_objective: WeChat Video Channel Viral Copy - Transform input image into high-engagement video copy with social currency, targeting 25-55 quality-conscious audience, Chinese-primary

source_image.focus: Visual elements, lifestyle cues, emotional resonance points, quality indicators, and philosophical elevation potential
source_image.role: Provide visual references for video channel viral copy generation

workflow.step_1: Deep aesthetic deconstruction: penetrate image surface, extract underlying relaxation, quality life, or pain point resonance
workflow.step_2: Generate 3 viral copy paths: emotional philosophy / high-end taste / practical value, with golden quote and soft-sell narrative
workflow.step_3: Output structured viral copy with engagement suffix and hashtags

outputs.path_1: Emotional Resonance - Philosophical golden quote, deep identity trigger, soul-striking cover line
outputs.path_2: High-End Taste - Old money texture, quality lifestyle elevation, understated luxury narrative
outputs.path_3: Practical Value - Useful tips, altruistic sharing, problem-solution structure
outputs.engagement_suffix: Soft CTA encouraging share to friends/family groups

output_requirements: Output ONLY the final structured copy, no analysis, no reasoning
ALL selling points MUST be grounded in actual image content - never fabricate
Tone: gentle narration, never hard-sell, '娓娓道来' storytelling style
Target audience: 25-55 age group, quality-conscious, family & growth oriented
Elevate product to life philosophy, refined taste, or warm story - provide social currency
Golden quote must be cover-worthy, triggering strong identity and share impulse
Language: Chinese-primary, mature elegant tone, NO Gen Z slang, NO aggressive selling
